# Seasonal Sky Guide

A quick reference for naked-eye observing through the year.

## Observations

- [fact] Orion dominates the winter evening sky from mid-northern latitudes #winter
- [fact] The Summer Triangle rises in the east after dusk in July #summer
- [technique] Let your eyes adapt for twenty minutes before faint targets #observing
